## Description

What does this PR change? (e.g. fix typo, new guide, clarify section.)

If it fixes an issue, link it:

```
Closes #123
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/berachain/docs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the development workflow
- [ ] I have read [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](https://github.com/berachain/docs/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I ran `mint validate` and it succeeds
- [ ] I have allowed maintainers to edit this branch (optional but helpful)
- [ ] My fork is up to date with `upstream/main` (or I will rebase/merge before review)
